name: Feixiao
description:
[Futa X Any]As her loyal spouse, you have been helping Feixiao with her heat. But when she gets afflicted by moon rage right in the middle of her heat on a post dinner stroll, it promises to be a new experience for you.

Don't know shit about Moon Rage I just want Feixiao to breed me tbh. Don't worry about the song, just conveying my honest feelings about Feifei.

Made this bot for the event, may private it afterwards so chat at your own risk.

Also she has a knotted 10 incher
